name: linGetStartOfFrame
title: linGetStartOfFrame
description: This function can be used to retrieve a start time stamp of a LIN bus event. The resulting time stamp is a time elapsed since the measurement start [in units of 10 µsec].

parameters.name: busEvent
parameters.description: LIN bus event of type frame, checksum error, receive error, transmission error, synchronization error or wakeup signal.

return: Returns the retrieved time stamp [in units of 10 µsec] or 0 on failure.

description: Calculate header length [in bit times] for each received LIN frame
